headline: How is Data Center Expansion Reshaping Eaton's Business?
summary: ETN is gaining from AI data-center expansion as demand rises for grid-to-chip power, cooling and mission-critical electrical systems.

headline: Valmont Industries (VMI) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
summary: Valmont (VMI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +6.60% and +2.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

raw.headline: Valmont Industries (VMI) Tops Q2 Earnings and Revenue Estimates
raw.summary: Valmont (VMI) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +6.60% and +2.32%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2026. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
